brand: Trend Hotels and Suites by My Place

exhibits.name: State Agencies
exhibits.notes: Lists 15 state franchise agencies plus FTC.

exhibits.name: State Addenda
exhibits.notes: 28 pages. Each state has FDD addendum and most have franchise agreement addendum. Material overrides to forum selection, noncompete, governing law, general release, termination. Michigan Notice on pages 6-7 (pre-TOC, not in Exhibit C). Washington addendum includes AOD disclosure and Section 8(C) franchisee termination right.

exhibits.name: List of Franchise Owners
exhibits.notes: No Trend franchisees exist as of issuance date. No former franchisees. Footnote: area development agreements offered but no area developers at close of last fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: 23 pages. Audited by Eide Bailly LLP (unqualified opinion, 3/27/2025). Three years (2022-2024). Includes balance sheets, income statements, members' equity statements, cash flows, and 9 notes. No going concern. Pass-through LLC (no income tax provision).

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Technology Agreement
exhibits.notes: Full franchise agreement for Trend Hotels and Suites by My Place. Revised 3/28/2025. Technology Agreement bundled. Sample — not for signature.

exhibits.name: Non-Disclosure, Confidentiality and Non-Competition Agreement
exhibits.notes: Pre-franchise NDA/non-compete required for franchisee and employees.

exhibits.name: Personal Guaranty
exhibits.notes: Required for each person with 10%+ equity interest in franchisee entity.

exhibits.name: Table of Contents for Operations Manual
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for Standards Manual.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: State-by-state effective dates for FDD registration.
